name: Chicken Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken breasts into thin strips.
2. In a large skillet, melt butter over medium heat. Brown the chicken until cooked through.
3. Stir in the chopped tomato, onion soup mix, and curry powder blended with water. Simmer, covered, for 15 minutes or until the chicken is fully cooked.
4. Stir in the yogurt; heat until well combined but do not boil.
5. To serve, arrange the chicken and sauce over hot rice and peas. Serve with flaked coconut, raisins, cashews, or almonds if desired.
Microwave Directions:
1. In a 2-quart casserole, melt butter at High (Full Power) for 1 minute.
2. Add the chicken and cook, covered, for 5 minutes at High (Full Power).
3. Stir in the chopped tomato, onion soup mix, and curry powder blended with water. Stir in the yogurt; heat for 1 minute at High (Full Power). Let stand, covered, for 5 minutes.
4. Serve as above.
